Common questions

Need to know.

Tap any question to expand.

Do I need council approval?+
Depends on location. In QLD, trailer-mounted units are often classified as caravans and need no DA. Fixed placement typically requires one. We connect you with a local town planner before purchase.
How long for delivery?+
6–10 weeks from order to arrival in Australia. Site delivery within 1–2 weeks of clearing customs.
Is plumbing/electrics certified?+
Yes — all units come pre-fitted with WaterMark certified plumbing and SAA certified electrical components.
Can I see one in person?+
Yes. Book a free viewing at our Brisbane display unit through the contact form.
What's included?+
Delivered unit with kitchen, bathroom, flooring, doors, windows, insulated panels. Excludes site prep, plumbing/electrical connection, and council fees.
Payment plans?+
Yes — payment plans and finance referrals available. Contact us to discuss.

Get in touch

Brisbane display unit open by appointment. We respond within one business day.
